title: Feinberg Forecast: Best Actor 2026 Predictions
text: Michael B. Jordan for Sinners is forecasted to win, with the prediction based on statistical analysis of precursor awards rather than personal preference. The Feinberg Forecast projects: 1) Michael B. Jordan - Sinners, 2) Timothée Chalamet - Marty Supreme, 3) Leonardo DiCaprio - One Battle After Another, 4) Wagner Moura - The Secret Agent, 5) Ethan Hawke - Blue Moon. Scott Feinberg emphasizes that his forecasts do not necessarily reflect his personal preferences. Instead, he projects outcomes by screening the films that are in contention, analyzing their campaigns, constantly checking-in with voters and studying relevant history and stats. The competitive nature of this category reflects broader uncertainty in the 2026 race, with Feinberg noting that the Best Actor category remains a genuine nailbiter despite late momentum shifts affecting other categories. The predictions prioritize statistical indicators over recent developments.
